info.name: Returns Application Usage Summaries Over a Selected Date Range

params.name: start
params.description: Start of range for resource count queries (ms since epoch)

params.name: end
params.description: End of range for resource count queries (ms since epoch)

params.name: asBytes
params.description: If the resulting payload counts should be returned as bytes

params.name: includeNonBillable
params.description: If non-billable payloads should be included in the result

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: page
params.description: Which page of results to return

params.name: perPage
params.description: How many items to return per page

params.name: filterField
params.description: Field to filter the results by. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply against the filtered field. Supports globbing. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: orgId
params.description: If not provided, return all applications. If provided but blank, only return applications belonging to the current user. If provided and an id, only return applications belonging to the given organization id.

params.name: exclude
params.description: Comma-separated list of resources to exclude from summary

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of summary fields to include in application summary

items.docs: Returns Application Usage Summaries Over a Selected Date Range

info.name: Returns the Dashboards the Current User Has Permission to See

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort the results by

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort the results by

params.name: page
params.description: Which page of results to return

params.name: perPage
params.description: How many items to return per page

params.name: filterField
params.description: Field to filter the results by. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply against the filtered field. Supports globbing. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: applicationId
params.description: If not provided, return all dashboards. If provided but blank, only return dashboards that are not linked to applications. If provided and an id, only return dashboards linked to the given application id.

params.name: orgId
params.description: If not provided, return all dashboards. If provided but blank, only return dashboards belonging to the current user. If provided and an id, only return dashboards belonging to the given organization id.

info.name: Asynchronously Updates Information for Matching Events by Subject and/or Current State

params.name: applicationId
params.description: ID associated with the application

params.name: filterField
params.description: Field to filter the events to act on by. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply against the filtered field. Supports globbing. Blank or not provided means no filtering.

params.name: state
params.description: If provided, act on events only in the given state.

params.name: query
params.description: Event filter JSON object which overrides the filterField, filter, and state parameters.

params.name: email
params.description: Email address to send a notification with update job results. Defaults to current user's email.

params.name: callbackUrl
params.description: Callback URL to call with update results from a job.

items.docs: Asynchronously Updates Information for Matching Events by Subject and/or Current State
